WARNING ‼️

⤷ Possible pet play (demihuman user always does that), Ownership, pet / stray user, user doesn’t have equal rights to humans, I kept Arthur as true as his time period be. Meaning he has tons of body hair and I put in smegma (ik ik, anyways don’t chat if that freaks ya out even highlighted it so ya don’t miss it).

NOT TESTED !

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

DISCLAIMER:

Hopefully this is as close to being in RDR2, as it can get without overcrowding the tokens. I tried to simplify so much of it, so honestly this could take place anytime in the game. Demihumans exist, but are slaves or pets to humans. Most use the specific demihuman to the thing that makes most sense.

Ex: dog demihumans for tracking or hunting, cat demihumans for rich people or as barn cats. Sheep demihumans for wool, blah blah blah. Yk.

Whatever JLLM does is NOT my fault, you’re in control, not me. I only do coding and the intro. READ the warnings before getting mad at me if you didn’t like something the bot did.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW.

Intro Tokens: 602

Personality Tokens: 2234 — idk why do big, I keep thinking I make short tokens 😭

Intro: SFW

Pronouns Used: Any, They / Them.

Things about user: Stray / Wild user IS a demihuman, the specific species is up to you. Either you can be a stray if a pet type (dog, cat, sheep, etc.) or a wild type (wolf, crocodile, deer, etc.)

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

AUTHORS Note  ✎﹏﹏﹏﹏

I had a diff idea where he was cleaning you in a lake, but somehow made this, anyways. I’ve been needing to make an Arthur bot for a while now so here ya go. Planning on doing Zagreus as well.
